heading: National strategy for military and veteran recreation
label: 8504 National strategy for military and veteran recreation
notes: References in TextSection 113, referred to in subsec. (a), is , , , which amended sections 200102 and 200104 of Title 54, National Park Service and Related Programs. As amended, establishes the Federal Interagency Council on Outdoor Recreation.section 113 of Pub. L. 118–234138 Stat. 2839section 200104 of Title 54Jan. 4, 2025

As amended, establishes the Federal Interagency Council on Outdoor Recreation.section 113 of Pub. L. 118–234138 Stat. 2839section 200104 of Title 54Jan. 4, 2025

children.heading: Strategy
children.label: a Strategy
children.text: Not later than 1 year after , the Federal Interagency Council on Outdoor Recreation established under section 113 shall develop and make public a strategy to increase visits to Federal recreational lands and waters by members of the Armed Forces, veterans, and Gold Star Family members.January 4, 20251See References in Text note below.1

children.label: A
children.text: establish objectives and quantifiable targets for increasing visits to Federal recreational lands and waters by members of the Armed Forces, veterans, and Gold Star Family members;

children.label: B
children.text: include an opportunity for public notice and comment;

children.label: C
children.text: emphasize increased recreation opportunities on Federal recreational lands and waters for members of the Armed Forces, veterans, and Gold Star Family members; and

children.label: D
children.text: provide the anticipated costs to achieve the objectives and meet the targets established under subparagraph (A); and
shall not establish any preference between similar recreation facilitated by noncommercial or commercial entities.

children.heading: Update to strategy
children.label: c Update to strategy
children.text: Not later than 5 years after the date of the publication of the strategy required under subsection (a), and every 5 years thereafter, the Federal Interagency Council on Outdoor Recreation shall update the strategy and make public the update.
